narration.text: This is your Coordinator Dashboard, the control room for keeping the build-out pipeline moving. Your job is to triage incoming work, reassign when someone's blocked, and clear bottlenecks before they snowball. Start with Suggested Tasks. Five cards are ready to be picked up, and each one shows the size, the priority, and the deadline at a glance. When a card looks right for the team, the Pick Up button claims it in a single click and moves it into Active Task. Over in the sidebar, your Coordinator Queue is the number that matters most: nine items are waiting on your call right now, decisions only you can make. The status counters across the top give you the team pulse, including twenty-one tasks On Hold that probably need a nudge. Below that, Review Submissions is sitting on five drafts already waiting for sign-off, so designers don't stall on you. Use Active Task, My Backlog, Team Board, and Notifications in the sidebar to switch contexts as the day evolves. From this one screen you can triage, reassign, unblock, and approve without ever losing the thread.
